report.summary: Cycle-close v2: No new commits since last EOD. 2 learn guides (Bitcoin Runes + Farcaster SocialFi) promoted to 389 published slugs. Git locks now 30h stale blocking 547 uncommitted files. 2 real TS errors persist. Vercel trial status critical/unknown.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: No new commits since last cycle (cb65a9d Day 42 publish is still HEAD). No new regressions introduced.

TypeScript: 42 errors total — 40 in structured-data.examples.ts (non-critical reference file), 2 real errors in /learn/crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx (unescaped JSX angle brackets lines 531, 533) — unchanged from last EOD
Published slugs: 389 (up 2 from 387 at last EOD — Bitcoin Runes + Farcaster SocialFi guides promoted by publish-v2 cycle)
102 phantom slugs still have no matching page.tsx files — unchanged, no new route files created this cycle
Production build cannot be verified in sandbox (OOM/bus error). Vercel builds with ignoreBuildErrors:true so TS errors won't block deploy
Publish-v2 QA passed all SEO markers (H1, meta tags, JSON-LD, breadcrumbs, OG/Twitter cards) on the 2 newly promoted pages

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: 14 API routes present: 6 public data routes (prices, trending, fear-greed, market-metrics, market-dominance, defi-yields) + 8 utility routes
market-dominance remains the most robust route — full fallback chain with 4 fallback references and X-Cache-Source headers
defi-yields still the weakest — no fallback data, no rate limiting, returns 500 on upstream failure
Rate limiting: present in cache-stats and health routes; standup-v4 reported 3/15 routes now wired (up from 0/6) — improvement ongoing but 6 public data routes still mostly unprotected
Cache headers inconsistent: market-metrics uses X-Cache (2 refs), prices has 1 X-Cache ref, most others have none
No data pipeline changes this cycle — all code unchanged since last commit

sections.title: DevOps
items: next.config.ts properly configured: standalone output, trailingSlash, ignoreBuildErrors:true, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency not explicitly set (using default)
Middleware operational: pillar pages hardcoded with X-Robots-Tag differentiation, security headers in place
Last commit cb65a9d (Day 42) — no new deploys triggered this cycle
Previous deploy 4oAZ7EabF was triggered by publish cycle but status unknown (sandbox egress blocked to Vercel)
Git lock files still present: HEAD.lock (30h old, Mar 16 11:17), index.lock (28h old, Mar 16 13:06) — blocking all commits
Vercel trial status: CRITICAL — was estimated at hours remaining as of standup-v4, may now be expired. Cannot verify from sandbox.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: 0 new commits. 2 pages promoted to published (Bitcoin Runes + Farcaster SocialFi) via file edits, but commit blocked by git locks.
547 uncommitted files (up 3 from 544 at last EOD) — includes all work from multiple cycles now trapped behind git locks
BLOCKER P0: Git lock files — HEAD.lock 30h stale, index.lock 28h stale. Only Jefe can resolve (rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock). Every cycle since Mar 16 has flagged this.
BLOCKER P0: Vercel trial — likely expired or hours away. If expired, site is dark. FOMC decision was today (Mar 17) — critical timing.
CARRY-OVER P1: 102 phantom published slugs with no page.tsx
CARRY-OVER P1: 2 real TS errors in crypto-index-funds-guide (unescaped JSX brackets)
CARRY-OVER P2: defi-yields route needs fallback data implementation
NEXT CYCLE: Resolve git locks → batch commit 547 files → deploy → verify Vercel billing status
